evals.prompt: preciso de dados concretos sobre a diferenca entre revisao sistematica, meta-analise e umbrella review — definicoes formais, proporcoes bibliometricas (% de RS que incluem MA), marcos historicos, terminologia. Slide novo partindo do zero, aula pra residentes de clinica medica
evals.expected_output: Report com Tier 1 sources, PMIDs CANDIDATE, numeros concretos, convergencias/divergencias naturais, livros-referencia mencionados

assertions.text: Tier 1 sources present (guidelines, landmark trials, or textbooks cited)
Convergence/divergence content present naturally in output
3+ PMIDs/DOIs cited
All PMIDs marked CANDIDATE
2+ concrete numbers with sources (%, NNT, n=)
No unsourced claims (no 'estudos mostram' without citation)
Report header with CANDIDATE status warning
Reference books or textbooks mentioned

evals.prompt: deep search no slide s-rs-vs-ma da aula metanalise — o slide tem h2 e esqueleto HTML mas precisa de conteudo fundacional
evals.expected_output: Report que detecta o slide, le o h2 existente, busca evidencia fundacional com Tier 1 sources e PMIDs CANDIDATE

assertions.text: Tier 1 sources present (guidelines, landmark trials, or textbooks cited)

2+ concrete numbers with sources (%, NNT, n=)

Report header with CANDIDATE status warning
Reference books or textbooks mentioned

evals.prompt: pesquisa profunda clopidogrel vs aspirina prevencao secundaria AVC isquemico — NNT, divergencia entre ESC e AHA, dados do CAPRIE e meta-analises recentes
evals.expected_output: Report com NNT + IC 95%, divergencias ESC vs AHA naturais, CAPRIE dados, PMIDs CANDIDATE, livros-referencia
